infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PreRoll needs the camera to show a preview and record after the countdown.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PreRoll needs the microphone to record audio with your videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: PreRoll saves your recorded clips to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: PreRoll needs camera access to record after the countdown finishes.
plugins.microphonePermission: PreRoll needs microphone access to record audio with your videos.

plugins.photosPermission: PreRoll saves your clips to your photo library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: PreRoll saves your recordings to your gallery.
